stemHtml: A pilot is about to shoot the approach with the A/P. S/he disconnects the A/P during the approach. What happens to the FD/FMA?

options.a: The performance needs to be recalculated to account for the manual landing technique.
options.b: All indications on the FMA and the FD will be normal except the A/P function.
options.c: The FMA will instruct her/him to perform a go-around.
